method: web.run evidence refresh plus internal synthesis

sources.claim: OpenTelemetry tracing centers on spans that capture operation details, and trace exporters send traces to downstream consumers for debugging or backends.
W3C Trace Context standardizes propagation of context information that uniquely identifies requests across distributed systems.
SLSA is a supply-chain integrity framework focused on preventing tampering and improving artifact integrity.
Trace timeline or waterfall views help distinguish sequential and parallel processing and expose details/attributes/events for spans.

design_implications: Use source_artifact and SHA-bound inputs so tracker cards are evidence-backed, not just status text.
Expose parent/child trace causality as a visual timeline so the operator can see cause -> evidence -> next action.
Keep span windows bounded and phone-safe rather than rendering the full ledger.
Treat provenance and export hash binding as operator-visible state.
